results.condition: build SPEC.md do not reference or change any files outside of this working directory.
results.evidence: `npm install` installed 74 packages (esbuild postinstall approved). `npm run build` ran `tsc --noEmit && vite build` and succeeded with no errors, producing `dist/index.html`, `dist/assets/index-*.css` (12.32 kB), and `dist/assets/index-*.js` (249.44 kB). `vite preview` served the built app at HTTP 200 on 127.0.0.1:4317. All source files verified present under `src/`. After review I also improved cross-column/cross-quadrant drag handling and re-ran the build successfully.
